author: Yacht_
name: MusicStatus
short: Automatically updates voice channel status to the currently playing track.
description: A Red cog that hooks into Lavalink to update the bot's voice channel status with the current track title.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store data or user information.
install_msg: Thanks for installing MusicStatus! Make sure the bot has the 'Set Voice Channel Status' permission in its voice channels.
